rag_rules: Insert AGREE annex blocks into the target component implementation scope when bindings depend on subcomponents or connections.
generic_rules: Preserve AADL structure by only referencing ports, subcomponents, or connections explicitly defined in the input model.
Place component-level contracts in type scope; implementation-level bindings in implementation scope.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE annexes must be wrapped in `annex agree {** ... **};` with double asterisks.
AGREE expressions must use only variables or constants explicitly exposed in scope; no implicit property access.
anti_patterns: Do not assume numeric bounds unless explicitly stated in the requirement and supported by the AADL data type.
Do not reference AADL properties (e.g., Period, Deadline) as AGREE variables unless mapped to explicit ports or constants.
irrelevant_topics: AADL Property Names Are Not AGREE Variables
